cases.gap: concrete generic type instantiation across files
source_snippets: export function mapValues<T, R>(items: readonly T[], mapper: (item: T) => R): R[] { return items.map(mapper); }
export function displayNames(users: readonly User[]): string[] { return mapValues(users, (user) => user.displayName); }

export type Present<T> = T extends null | undefined ? never : T;
export function presentUser(user: User | null): Present<User> | null { return user; }
